EmailTemplate.description: Email to be sent to FUL Trades customers who are not in auto-renewal and opted out of marketing communications, so they are aware their policy is due to expire.
EmailTemplate.name: FUL Trades_Renewal Due (out of AR)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your business insurance will expire soon
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Your insurance policy [policy number] is due to expire on [expiry date].
If you wish to renew your business insurance policy, you can contact us on 01242 808740 between the hours 8:00am – 5:30pm Monday-Friday and our team will complete your purchase over the phone.
We will beat any like for like quote Our Price Promise (https://go.kingsbridge.co.uk/PL-MRR-0225) means that if you find like-for-like cover elsewhere at a lower price, we will beat the quote. Terms and conditions apply.
We hope you find our policy suits all your business needs and we look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
